articles.author: Pete Nakos
articles.title: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby sues NCAA over gambling investigation - On3
articles.description: Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby is set to sue the NCAA in Lubbock District Court, sources tell On3.
articles.content: Texas Tech quarterbackBrendan Sorsby is suing the NCAA in Lubbock District Court, Texas Tech sources tell On3. According to Yahoo! Sports, attorneys representing Sorsby notified the NCAA last week, r… [+5426 chars]
